description: CompositionRed and green floral print kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with a border at the cuffs, mandarin collar with a split V-neck extending to a mock chest placket, broad border above the hem and split side seamsFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis simple yet stylish printed kurta from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western kurta blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas or even leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
